content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation mechanisms (like ICM and RND from Topic A) can be repurposed as a dynamic pruning and prioritization framework for long-term memory in state-of-the-art active learning agents (Topic B, 2024-2025 SOTA). Instead of only using curiosity to drive exploration of new environments, curiosity scores can rank existing stored memory to retain only the most information-dense, surprising experiences that improve future active learning query performance.
